author: mark
text:
Document scripting contract in SKILL.md

Adds a dedicated 'Scripting with bl' section describing the stdout
contract of each command, lists which subcommands accept --json, and
shows how --parent + --dep compose when building task trees in a loop.

Also documents --parent on bl create, clarifies that the 'epic' task
type is a label with no special behavior, and calls out the bootstrap
side effects of bl init in a zero-commit repo.
